band_rationale: Medium, deliberately widened DOWNWARD (#55): a spec whose FRs are tech mandates ('build with React and Postgres') deserves roughly 65-80 by external judgment (IBM RQA / QVscribe would weight stack leakage heavily), while the current engine scores it 90. Floor 65 lets the tracked severity re-tuning land without the gate resisting it; ceiling 92 requires the defects to keep costing at least 8 points. Engine output at labeling time: 90.
note: Tech-stack detail and speculative future features in a spec. REQ-COMPOUND is a genuine extra: FR-001 bundles React + Postgres + websockets in one requirement. Calibration gap: current scoring (~90) is lenient versus external judgment; the band floor is set so fixing that leniency PASSES the gate.
